privacy.title: Thuruk (privacy) a ni
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Room key thar a dawn chuan — i device zawng zawngah automatic-in a forward vek (E2E encrypted)
privacy.historySyncHint: Device zawng zawnga message awm zawng zawng encrypted copy. Server hian noise chauh a hmu thin
privacy.crossSignHint: Device tharte chu HMAC signature hmangin automatic-in verify (substitution laka invenna)
privacy.backupHint: Key zawng zawng chu passphrase hmangin encrypt la, server-ah save rawh. Device thlak chungchangah — phrase pakhat hmangin restore.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Digit 6 code hmangin device thara key transfer tur. Key te hi ECIES hmanga encrypt a ni — server hian a chhiar thei lo.
privacy.ssssHint: Shamir-a scheme hmangin master key chu N part-ah then rawh. M part eng pawh hian key chu a rawn restore leh ang. Part tin hi rintlak contact (ECIES) bik atan encrypt a ni. Server hian encrypted blob chauh a hmu thin.
privacy.federatedHint: Federation node hrang hrangah encrypted backup shards sem darh (Shamir scheme). Server a bo pawhin — peers hmanga recovery.
privacy.ktHint: Hash chain (Merkle) hmanga public key thlak danglamna zawng zawng append-only log. Server chuan entry tin a sign vek — audit laiin forgery a awm tih hmuhchhuah a ni.

panic.keysOverwritten: Encryption keys te chu a overwrite a
panic.callSettingsNote: Note: Force TCP leh Relay mode hian latency a tipung thei a, mahse privacy sang ber a pe thei thung. Traffic masking hian SDP session-ah random padding a dah belh a, hei hian connection metadata analysis a tikhawlo a ni.

botConstructor.title: Bot siamtu a ni

botConstructor.deployed: Bot deploy hlawhtling tak a ni!
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: User-in bot a start hunah welcome message...
botConstructor.scheduledMessage: Message chu a hun takah thawn tur a ni...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Chibai! Kei hi i bot ka ni. Command hmuh nan /help hmang ang che.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Command awm thei te chu:
/help — He thuchah hi entir rawh
botConstructor.thenResponse: A dik a nih chuan chhanna...

botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: User-in message a thawn hian a trigger thin
botConstructor.adminMessage: Admin hnena thawn tur message thawn tur...
botConstructor.docsTitle: Bot Constructor te ziah chhuah a ni
botConstructor.docsCommand: User-in command bik (e.g. /help, /start) a thawn chuan a chhang thin. Multi-step dialog siam nan conversation steps i dah thei bawk.
botConstructor.docsMessage: User message chu pattern nena a inmil chuan a chhang thin. Regex a hmang thin — e.g. "hello|hi" tih hi thumal pahnih nen a inmil vek. Case-insensitive tak a ni.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Message users ten /start hmanga bot an start huna an hmuh hmasak ber. Bot tin hian pakhat an nei vek tur a ni.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Schedule angin message a thawn nghal vek. Nitin hriattirna, kar tin digest, emaw, hunbi neia puan chhuahna atan a tha hle.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Bot logic chu a branch hrang hrang a. Variable emaw user input emaw check la, result a zirin chhanna danglam rawh.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot hian list atang hian random takin response pakhat a thlang thin. Fiamthu, tips, chibai bukna emaw, chhanna hrang hrang emaw atan a tha hle.
botConstructor.docsApi: External API ah HTTP request a siam a, bot message a response chu a hmang thin. Response fields reference nan {data.field} hmang rawh.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Trigger a nih chuan room admin hnenah notification a thawn thin. Alert, user notification thar, emaw moderation atan a tangkai.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Command block ah step te dah la, interactive dialog siam rawh. Step tin hian zawhna a zawt a, user chhanna a nghak a, variable-ah a save thin. {variableName} hmanga chhanna hnuhnung berah variable hmang rawh.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Dynamic value insert nan response text ah curly braces {variable} hmang rawh. State variable te hi message hrang hrangah a awm reng thin.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Response tinah hian built-in variable a awm a:
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: User chu admin/owner a nih chuan a dik
botConstructor.docsFormatting: Text Format dan tur a ni
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Chhannaah HTML ang chi formatting i hmang thei ang:
botConstructor.docsInterpolation: Variable value chu dah lut rawh
botConstructor.docsTips: Pro Tips te pawh a awm
botConstructor.docsTip1: Welcome block hmangin tan la rawh — users te hmuh hmasak ber a ni
botConstructor.docsTip2: Command awm zawng zawng tarlanna /help command dah la
botConstructor.docsTip3: Registration, survey, emaw data lakkhawmna atan inbiakna step hmang rawh
botConstructor.docsTip4: Smart branching atan Condition block te chu variable te nen inzawm khawm rawh
botConstructor.docsTip5: I bot chu deploy hnuah room pakhatah inbiakna hmangin test rawh

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Ṭawng hman dan tur
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Bot siamna atana scripting language tha tak a ni. 96 features a awm. Rust backend ah a awm.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix hi domain-specific language (DSL) a ni a, Vortex bot ziah nan a bul atanga siam a ni. Ṭawng dangin library, callback leh boilerplate an mamawhna hmunah chuan Gravitix hian first-class event handler, conversation flows, leh built-in state a pe che a — chu zawng zawng chu Rust aṭanga inspired syntax thianghlim, chhiar awlsam takah a pe vek a ni.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Readable — code hi intent angin a chhiar a, machinery angin a chhiar lo
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — static type te hian runtime hmain error an man thin
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive — flows, guards, leh pattern matching te chu a chhungah a awm a
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — class awm lo, inheritance awm lo, zir tur framework awm lo
gravitixDocs.whoIsThisFor: Hei hi tu tan nge ni?
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix hi Vortex bot siam thuai duh tan a ni a — code i ziak ngai lo emaw, Python boilerplate hmanga chau tawh developer seasoned tak i nih pawhin. He reference hian Gravitix hi principle hmasa ber a\angin a zirtir a: experience hmasa a ngai lo.
gravitixDocs.howToRead: He reference hi chhiar dan tur
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Section tin hian a hmaa awmte chu a siam chhuak vek a ni. Programming lama thar i nih chuan a chung atanga a hnuai thlengin chhiar thin ang che. Ṭawng dang i hriat tawh chuan, table of contents hmangin i ngaihven zawng chu direct-in zuang thla rawh.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Zero atanga running bot panna kawng chak ber.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — user-in /start a thawn huna kal tur handler a sawifiah. emit "..." — chuan user hnenah message a thawn let leh thin. {ctx.first_name} — user hming hmasa ber chu string chhungah a interpolate thin.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Gravitix IDE ah khan top bar a Run button kha click la. I Vortex Bot Token kha i tih chuan i ziak lut ang. Bot chu a intan nghal a — build step a ngai lo.
gravitixDocs.syntaxAtGlance: Syntax chu a han en teh
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Gravitix program tin hi building block bulpui pathum atanga siam a ni a, chungte chu handlers, emit statement leh logic te an ni.
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterOn: Eng nge a hnua kal zel
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Trigger pakhat atan handler tam tak
gravitixDocs.explicitTypes: Type annotations chiang tak tak a awm
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Gravitix a value tin hian type a nei vek a. Type system hi static a ni: types te hi compile laiin check thin a ni a, i bot a kal hmain.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Operator te chuan value te chu an inzawm khawm a, value thar an siam chhuak thin.
gravitixDocs.comparisonOps: Comparison operator te chu a ni
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Gravitix-a string awmte hi UTF-8 encoded text a ni. Anni hian rich interpolation leh built-in operations suite an support a ni.
gravitixDocs.stringInterpolation: String hmanga inthlak danglamna (interpolation) a ni
gravitixDocs.multilineStrings: Multiline string hrang hrang a awm
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: String operation te chu built-ins hmangin a ni
gravitixDocs.forInLoop: for ... in loop ah a awm
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Pattern-match value pakhat chu pattern tam tak nen. Switch statement chak tak angin ngaihtuah rawh.
gravitixDocs.regexPatterns: Regex pattern hrang hrang a awm
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Functions te hi code block hman nawn theih a ni. Anni hian sawi nawn leh loh nan an pui che a, code hriatthiam a awlsam phah bawk.
gravitixDocs.returnValues: Value te chu a rawn kir leh ang
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Handlers hi Gravitix bot thinlung a ni. Handler tin hian event chi khat bik an ngaithla a, chu event chu a thlen hunah an run thin.
gravitixDocs.guardClauses: Guard Clauses te pawh a awm
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Guards te hian handler pakhatah condition add tir che. Handler chu guard in true a evaluate chauhvin a run thin.
gravitixDocs.contextObject: Context Object tih hi a ni
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: ctx object hi handler tin chhungah automatic in a awm vek a. Tuna message awm mek leh a thawntu user chungchang information a awm a.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State hian i bot hian message inkar ah thil a hre reng thei. State tel lo chuan message tin hi independent a ni a, bot hian memory a nei lo.
gravitixDocs.listsInState: State hrang hrangah list a awm
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Flows hian multi-step conversation chu linear, readable style-in a ziak thei a ni. Flow pakhat chu a pause thei a, user message lo awm tur chu a nghak thei bawk.
gravitixDocs.waitKeyword: A nghah tih keyword a ni
gravitixDocs.multiStepForm: Step hrang hranga siam theih a ni
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Message thawn hi bot atanga thil chhuak ber a ni.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Schedule-ah code automatic-in run rawh — cron jobs a awm lo, external services a ngai lo.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: every — interval-ah tih nawn leh rawh
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: at — ni khata hun bituk chhunga tlan
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Pipe operator |> chuan function dang ah argument hmasa ber atan value a pass a. Chaining operation te chu chhiar theih turin a siam a, veilam atanga dinglam thlengin a siam bawk.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix hian try / catch / finally blocks hmangin structured error handling a pe a.
gravitixDocs.structsEnums: Structs & Enums te pawh a awm
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs hian related data chu named type hnuaiah group theih a ni. Enums hian variant hrang hrang closed set a sawifiah a.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix hian math library kimchang tak a thawn chhuak a, ~180 functions a nei bawk.
gravitixDocs.logExp: Logarithm & Exponential hmanga siam a ni
gravitixDocs.geometryInterp: Geometry leh Interpolation hmanga thil tih dan
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix hian native complex type a nei a — 64-bit float pahnih, a tak tak leh suangtuahnaa thil awmte entir a ni.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix hian numerical calculus a huam a: derivative leh integral te chu arbitrary function hmanga chhut a ni.
gravitixDocs.numericalIntegration: Numerical integration hmanga inzawmna (numerical integration) a ni
gravitixDocs.sequencesSeries: Sequence & Series hrang hrang a awm
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebra: Linear Algebra hmanga siam a ni
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra chu vector leh matrices te Mathematics a ni.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Number theory hian integer-te property a zirchiang a. Tunlai cryptography dinna bulpui.
gravitixDocs.combinatorics: Combinatorics & Sequence hrang hrang a awm bawk
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Statistics hian data atanga sawifiahna, thlirletna leh thutlukna siamna hmanrua a pe a ni.
gravitixDocs.correlationCov: Correlation & Covariance hmanga inzawmna (correlation & Covariance) a awm
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Special function te hi differential equation pawimawh tak takte solution a ni.
gravitixDocs.airyFunctions: Airy functions te pawh a awm
gravitixDocs.orthogonalPolynomials: Orthogonal polynomial te chu a awm a
gravitixDocs.ellipticIntegrals: Elliptic integral te chu a awm a
gravitixDocs.transformsFFT: Transforms & FFT te a awm bawk
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Fourier transform hian signal pakhat chu a constituent frequency-ah a decompose thin.
gravitixDocs.stringFunctions: String function hrang hrang a awm
gravitixDocs.envVars: Environment hrang hranga thil awm thei te
gravitixDocs.registrationBot: Registration Flow Bot hmanga siam a ni
gravitixDocs.bestPractices: Thil tih dan tha ber ber
gravitixDocs.bp1: Hriat loh chu handle fo ang che
gravitixDocs.bp3: Permission atan if-chain ai chuan guard hmang zawk rawh
gravitixDocs.bp4: Logic chu function hrang hrangah extract rawh
gravitixDocs.bp5: Nesting tihtlem nan early return hmang rawh
gravitixDocs.bp6: Thil hming chiang takin sawi rawh
gravitixDocs.bp7: State chu uluk takin reset rawh
gravitixDocs.bp8: Spam ven nan state hmang rawh
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Gravitix zir dan tha ber chu siam hi a ni. Echo bot awlsam tak hmangin tan la la, state add la, flows add leh rawh. Concept thar i zir apiang hian thil awm thei tam zawk a hawng thin.
